ChooseWhenText: Choose it when City A needs a clean shard refill and you want the next dispatch window to stay steady.
WatchOutText: It gives up the bigger shard spike and accepts a lower payout ceiling.
FollowUpHintText: Usually leaves the next dispatch cleaner instead of forcing another hard reset.
PartyFitText: Best with Bulwark or Salvager-style crews that convert steady rooms into reliable haul.
CombatPlanText: Expect slime-heavy sustain fights, stronger shrine value, and a steadier elite setup.
EventFocus: Shrine recovery and supply prep stay online.
RewardPreview: Reliable shards, stronger recovery, clean monarch finish.
ExpectedNeedImpactText: Best route for stabilizing City A's next dispatch window.
